content.en:
However, even if the Golden Toad True Ancestor asked for help now, it was too late to rescue them.

I saw that the True Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain carried out the Void Blockade, and then used the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique to suppress the Void, and under the superimposed suppression of a large number of True Ancestors' Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, this piece of Void seemed to be completely solidified.

Under such circumstances, the True Ancestors of the Heavenly Spirit Sect could not travel through the space at all, and could only rely on their flight speed.

But under the siege of so many True Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain, how could they fly away?

Kill!

The many generals of the Black Wind Mountain led a large number of peak masters and true ancestors to kill the true ancestors of the Heavenly Spirit Sect.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

One True Ancestor after another fell, and in the blink of an eye, the Heavenly Spirit Sect's army of True Ancestors fell and died one after another, and even the Golden Toad True Ancestor was casually pinched to death by the Blood Demon General.

After the fall of the True Ancestors of the Heavenly Spirit Sect, the army of Black Wind Mountain entered the Domain Fragment Space where the ancient ruins were located.

And at this time, the true ancestors of the Zixia Sect had already discovered it.

Huangguang True Ancestor and many other Supreme True Ancestors appeared, and a large number of True Ancestors of the Zixia Sect faced the Black Wind Mountain True Ancestors one after another.

At this time, Ye Tiancai really understood how many troops the Zixia Sect had deployed in this domain fragment.

"At least 100,000 True Ancestors!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

How many True Ancestors are there in the entire Zixia Sect, although it is a Sevenfold Heaven Force, at most there are only 500,000 True Ancestors, and many of them are new True Ancestors.

It can be said that the Zixia Sect sent almost one-fifth of all True Ancestors to this Domain Realm Fragment, which shows how much they attach importance to the ancient ruins.

Seeing so many True Ancestors, the Bloody General showed an excited look.

The Zixia Sect attaches so much importance to the ancient ruins, which shows how valuable the ancient ruins are, not only the Nine Secluded Forbidden Pool, but also other treasures and resources.

"Black Wind Mountain, are you going to start a war with our Zixia Sect?"

Huang Guang True Ancestor roared.

Their Zixia Sect is not a middle three-heaven force, allowing the Black Wind Mountain to ravage.

It was just that the Black Wind Mountain destroyed the Liuli Sect before, after all, the Liuli Sect was only a five-fold heaven force, but the Zixia Sect was a seven-fold heavenly force, a real upper three-heaven force, and it was a very ancient force, and at its peak, it was an eightfold heaven force.

How dare Black Wind Mountain make a move on their Purple Xia Sect?

"Give up this ruin, we in Black Wind Mountain can not kill you!"

The Bloody General suggested.

Black Wind Mountain is not unreasonable, as long as the Zixia Sect gives way here, they can not attack the Zixia Sect.

They actually didn't want to be enemies of the Zixia Sect, after all, the Zixia Sect was not weak, but the Seventh Heaven Force, if the Black Wind Mountain offended too many Upper Triple Heaven Forces, it would also be in big trouble.

In the past, Black Wind Mountain rarely robbed the Triple Heaven Forces, but this time it was different.

This ruin actually has the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, he went to ask the Six Kings, and the awakened wisps of consciousness of the Six Kings told him to occupy the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool at all costs.

Therefore, this time, Black Wind Mountain will make a strong move, and it will not hesitate to be the enemy of the Sevenfold Heaven Force like the Zixia Sect.

"This relic is of little value, and it has almost been developed by our Zixia Sect, what do you want it for?"

Huang Guang True Ancestor Dao.

"If it's worthless, will your Zixia Sect send 100,000 True Ancestors to guard here?" the Bloody General sneered.

The bloody general was not afraid of the Zixia Sect asking for help, because if the Black Wind Mountain wanted to occupy this ruin, it had to fight with the entire Zixia Sect, otherwise how could he dig the ruins with peace of mind?

If the Zixia Sect was unwilling to give up, they would only have to fight to the death.

Either the Black Wind Mountain is defeated, or the Zixia Sect is defeated, and there is no other choice.

As for destroying the Zixia Sect, Black Wind Mountain didn't have this idea yet, it was too difficult and too difficult to destroy an ancient Sevenfold Heaven force, and the Blood Demon General didn't want to die.

"Give you ten seconds, or get out of the way, or fight!"

After the bloody general finished speaking, he began to count.

One!

Two!

Three!

......

Ten seconds passed, and the Yellow Light True Ancestor did not retreat, and none of the True Ancestors of the Zixia Sect left.

They all knew very well what this relic was unexpectedly for the Zixia Sect, and once it was lost, the Dao Ancestors would not let them go.

"Kill!"

The bloody general spoke.

The 500,000 True Ancestor army of Black Wind Mountain made a move, and instantly crushed the 100,000 army of the Zixia Sect, which was basically five to one.

And Ye Tian also made a move and picked the Huangguang True Ancestor.

Seeing that Ye Tian had made a move on him, Huangguang True Ancestor directly cast a forbidden technique, and his terrifying strength exploded, almost reaching the peak realm of the strongest True Ancestor, second only to the level of Leo True Ancestor, although such an outbreak could not last, and the sequelae were very large, but he couldn't care about it.

He wanted to kill Ye Tian and then rescue the other True Ancestors, otherwise every second of delay would be a large number of True Ancestors.

Of course.

He didn't recognize Ye Tian at first sight, after all, Ye Tian was wearing the mask of Black Wind Mountain, but as soon as he fought, Ye Tian's familiar forbidden body revealed his identity.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, it's you, I'll kill you!"

Huangguang True Ancestor hated Ye Tian very much and yelled.

However, at this time, Ye Tian performed the Thousand Dao Technique of Selfless Vacuum.

"Suppression!"

The Dao Technique Realm formed by the selfless vacuum suppressed the Yellow Light True Ancestor, putting him under unimaginable pressure, and his strength dropped in an instant.

Then, Ye Tian condensed the Dao Technique Ten Thousand True Spear.

Go!

The Ten Thousand Evil True Spear easily pierced through the Yellow Light True Ancestor's defenses, knocking a bloody hole in his body.

Subsequently, a forbidden spear also condensed and formed, piercing through the head of the Yellow Light True Ancestor.

Even so, the Yellow Light True Ancestor was only hit hard, and did not fall.

But in Ye Tian's hands, he has no power to resist, as time passes, he will still fall, and this time will not last long, no matter how many things he has to protect his life, he can't save him.

"Invincible True Ancestor, you have actually reached the combat power of Invincible True Ancestor!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor said in fear.

It's only been how long it has been, Ye Tian has actually been promoted from the strongest true ancestor to the invincible true ancestor, it is simply too rebellious.

Invincible True Ancestor combat power, this is the combat power that many genius True Ancestors have dreamed of all their lives!

He also wanted to become an invincible true ancestor, but after cultivating for a long time, there was no hope at all, and the Nine Shadows Forbidden Pool gave him a little hope.

Unexpectedly, Black Wind Mountain intervened.

"I'm not reconciled!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor said angrily.

At this moment, a figure tore through the space and descended, grabbing the Yellow Light True Ancestor with one hand, as if to save the Yellow Light True Ancestor.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian urged the Great Wilderness Law Body, and then used the Great Void Splitting Technique, directly forcing the other party back.

Only then did he see the face of the person who came.

"Zi Chi True Ancestor, save me!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor saw the person coming and shouted.

General Bloody said: "General Jiuji, be careful, this guy is called Zichi True Ancestor, but he is a very ancient True Ancestor, he has not appeared for a long time, I thought he had fallen, but I didn't expect him to be alive." He is an invincible true ancestor, and his combat power is weaker than mine, but he is not weak in the invincible true ancestor level!"

The bloody general did not come to help Ye Tian, because he was also dragged down, and he was an invincible true ancestor.

The Zixia Sect has two invincible true ancestors, one is the Zichi True Ancestor and the other is the Zigang True Ancestor.

Originally, these two invincible true ancestors were almost unborn, but this time they were forced to appear, otherwise this relic would not be able to be saved.

"There are actually two invincible true ancestors in a mere Sevenfold Heaven Force!"

Ye Tian was also a little surprised, after all, Black Wind Mountain had only one invincible true ancestor before, and even now he had two invincible true ancestors.

Could it be that the Black Wind Mountain is still weaker than the Zixia Sect?

Just as the Purple Red True Ancestor was about to attack Ye Tian, the void cracked, and a True Ancestor wearing the mask of the Black Wind Mountain appeared, blocking the Purple Red True Ancestor.

This person is a general of the Black Wind Mountain, and he is also an invincible True Ancestor combat power.

I saw Zi Chi open his mouth and said, "General Motian, you are really still alive." In the past, when the Black Wind Mountain was active, there was only one of the three major generals, the bloody general, and I thought that the other two generals of the three major generals had fallen! If I guessed correctly, the Ferris General, you were severely injured when you passed through the Dark Forbidden Domain, and now you haven't fully recovered from your injuries!"

The Ferris general sneered: "I was seriously injured, could it be that you didn't, I don't estimate that your injuries have not recovered." Besides, my own combat power is stronger than yours, and you are not my opponent!"

As they spoke, the two began to fight!
